features: 【2025 Sturdy Clip Hook】Adopt the latest hook clip design, the hooks are special metal, which makes them more sturdy and durable. And the length of the hook clip can be adjusted by rotating the adjustment knob, which can be fixed more firmly on the vent blade than traditional crochet. (NOTE: Suitable for horizontal and vertical air vent outlets but not compatible with circular vents.）

【One Hand Operation】Features a one-button release system that allows you to release your phone with one hand. Simply press the holding arms on both sides to lock the device. No complicated operations, giving you a safer and better driving experience.

【Comprehensive Protection】The super stable triangular design perfectly protects your mobile device from shaking and sliding during driving; In addition, the clip arm and holder are equipped with super soft and super elastic silicone pads to ensure that the device and the car air outlet will not be scratched while driving.

【360° Flexible Rotation】This car phone holder is equipped with a 360° rotating ball joint, which helps you rotate the car mount horizontally and vertically. It does not block the view and can be easily adjusted with one hand to give you the best viewing angle without interfering with vision while driving. You can browse, answer calls and play music happily in your car.

【Thick Case & Big Phones Friendly】The car phone holder fits for smartphones without removing the case(even the thick case).Our universal car phone holder is compatible with all 4.0-7.0 inch phones, such as iPhone 17 Pro Max/ 17 Pro/ 17/ AIR/ 16/ 16 Pro/ 16 Plus/ 16 Pro Max/ 15/ 15 Pro/ 15 Plus/ 15 Pro Max/ 14 Pro Max/ 14 Plus/ 14 Pro/ 14/ 13 Pro Max/ 13 Pro/ 13/ 13 mini/ 12, Galaxy, Google Pixel, and Motorola, etc. Ideal festival gifts for family and friends.

Blukar Car Phone Holder Merchant video One-Button Release Touch the back button gentlely, the clamp arms will spread instantly to save much time without tedious steps. Silicone Panel The panel surface is covered with soft silicone which can prevent phone from being scratched and relieve external shocks. 360° Freely-Rotating The ball adapter can 360° rotate to easily switch the phone to the best angle for enjoying comfortable driving horizon. Reserved Charging Space The reserved charging space ensures the phone with long duration on the journey so that you can feel free to enjoy the long drive. Wide Compatibility Compatible with All 4-7" Phones Owing to the adjustable support foot and arms, both mini and pro max phone models can be ideally compatible with the holder.The arms are up to 0.7" wide ,which is perfectly fine even with thick phone cases. Applicable for Multiple Air Vents The metal hook is 3.6cm long, perfectly compatible with both horizontal and vertical air vents.
